title: artemisia capitata
intro: Artemisia capitata, also known as Santa Maria, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its white or yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Artemisia capitata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Artemisia capitata is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
